creator: jacardenasm@gmail.com
text:
Hi, it's an strange error because if you try to build  devel/ode
again, it will compile without problems.

tb3 and tb4 tinderboxes build devel/ode without problems but i saw
this error some times when  i was testing ode 0.8.

http://tb3.droso.net/logs/6-acm/ode-0.8,1.log
http://tb4.droso.net/logs/6-STABLE/ode-0.8,1.log

Try

make clean clean-depends && make install clean clean-depends

Greetings
ACM
